title: Rollback Readiness Checklist Model
description: Rollback Readiness Checklist enumerating preconditions that must be met before a rollback can be initiated.

fields.name: condition
fields.purpose: Description of the precondition to verify

fields.name: satisfied
fields.purpose: Boolean flag indicating whether the condition is met

fields.name: verified_by
fields.purpose: Operator or system that verified the condition

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
